
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 4.9 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...

Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -14.847804943773202 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.020888422829123655 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -15.825123 Hartree @ iterations 231.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
